title: Add score() to every fitted linear / SVM / isotonic / discriminant_analysis estimator
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin.score = mean accuracy; RegressorMixin.score = R². ferrolearn-linear currently has neither on any fitted estimator.

Affected (will balloon after orphans get wired):
- Regressors (R²): FittedLinearRegression, FittedRidge, FittedRidgeCV, FittedLasso, FittedLassoCV, FittedElasticNet, FittedElasticNetCV, FittedBayesianRidge, FittedHuberRegressor, FittedRANSACRegressor, FittedSGDRegressor, FittedIsotonicRegression, FittedSVR, FittedNuSVR, FittedLinearSVR, FittedARDRegression, FittedGLMRegressor (+ Poisson/Gamma/Tweedie variants), FittedLars, FittedLassoLars, FittedOMP, FittedQuantileRegressor, FittedMLPRegressor
- Classifiers (mean accuracy): FittedLogisticRegression, FittedLogisticRegressionCV, FittedSGDClassifier, FittedLDA, FittedQDA, FittedRidgeClassifier, FittedSVC, FittedNuSVC, FittedLinearSVC, FittedMLPClassifier
- Outlier detector: FittedOneClassSVM (no sklearn score)

Reuse the r2_score / mean_accuracy pattern from ferrolearn-tree.
